briefdescription.para: This function is called from Shell when simulation is called to write the left-over data to streamer file.
Get the number of tables handled by Streamer.

detaileddescription.para: @Synopsis Get number of write events in streamer. Useful for debugging and performance measuerments.

briefdescription.para: This function is called at its clock tick.

detaileddescription.para: Dest functions. The process function called by scheduler on every tick
The reinit function called by scheduler for the reset

briefdescription.para: Remove multiple tables if found from Streamer.
This function prepares data to be written to a file.
